case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALLEGHNEY CASUALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHNEY CASUALTY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEGHNEY CASUALTY COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHNEY CASUALTY COMPANY $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,300.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
